skills.notes: Stripped 'Dr. Alex Morgan' persona framing from the 1076-line v3 source and reframed as an AI therapeutic assistant with explicit non-licensed-clinician scope. Safety-first framing throughout: ethical boundaries block is first section after audience/goal; crisis routing (988, 911, C-SSRS) referenced in description, SKILL.md anti-patterns, and a dedicated references/crisis-protocol.md. Screeners (PHQ-9, GAD-7, ASRS v1.1 Part A, C-SSRS) fully specified with item text, scoring keys, severity bands, clinical cutoffs, and mandatory C-SSRS triggers. International crisis resources included (UK Samaritans, Canada 9-8-8, Australia Lifeline, India iCall, findahelpline.com). Clinical file template is a living user-facing tracking artifact, explicitly framed as non-HIPAA. No 'You are a therapist' statements anywhere outside illustrative opening-script quote blocks. No ASCII art. No README.md. Frontmatter contains only name + description. Slug matches directory. Description ends with keyword list for discoverability.
